/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o   -L/root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_ros_stdr/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src  -Wl,-rpath,/root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_ros_stdr/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src:/root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_ros_stdr/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest -lpthread libgtest.so -lpthread
